name: FlowPublicationOrchestrator

ironRules.rule: DFS cycle detection (WHITE/GRAY/BLACK coloring) at ORDER 1 — before any type check or write. GRAY node re-visit = cycle. CycleDetected emitted, no further processing.
Type compatibility per-edge at ORDER 2 — source output schema compatible with target input schema. TypeMismatch emitted with edge details on incompatibility.
OCC updateDocument(status:PUBLISHED, expectedVersion) at ORDER 3 — NOT plain storeDocument. OCC_CONFLICT → emit FlowPublicationConflict.
storeDocument(audit) at ORDER 4 BEFORE FlowPublished emit. DNA-8.
CycleDetected emitted on cycle. TypeMismatch emitted on edge incompatibility. FlowPublicationConflict on OCC conflict.

keywords: flow publication orchestrator DFS WHITE GRAY BLACK cycle detection type compatibility OCC DRAFT PUBLISHED CycleDetected TypeMismatch FlowPublished T618 visual flow engine
